untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of consecutive same-direction moves (3-4 periods) — requires multi-bar sequence logic not expressible with allowed operators; (2) 'estimated fair value' — not defined and no fair value indicator available; (3) 'fundamental catalyst' — requires external fundamental data not in allowed indicators. Approximation used Bollinger Bands as proxy for overshoot detection and consecutive logic cannot be properly encoded.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses bb_upper/bb_lower as proxy for 1.5 std dev overshoot concept. True consecutive-move detection (3-4 bars same direction) cannot be implemented without array indexing or sequence operators. Fundamental catalyst check cannot be performed with available indicators. Recommend manual signal filtering or custom indicator development.
